title: Merge Overlapping Intervals
prompt:
Given an array of intervals where each interval is represented as [start, end], merge all overlapping intervals and return the resulting array of non-overlapping intervals.

Example:
Input: [[1,3],[2,6],[8,10],[15,18]]
Output: [[1,6],[8,10],[15,18]]
Explanation: Since [1,3] and [2,6] overlap, they are merged into [1,6].
hint_notes: Key idea is to sort intervals by start time first, then iterate through them and merge overlapping ones. Common mistake is forgetting to update the end time properly when merging - always take the maximum of existing end and new end time.
